text: This disastrous policy has already destroyed household budgets. The official inflation report shows prices rose again, and families are being crushed.
The corrupt minister announced a new contract while unemployment remained high. Citizens deserve the truth.

Crime rose 4 percent last year, and the city is becoming a nightmare for ordinary residents.
The hospital closed two wards, leaving vulnerable patients abandoned by a failed system.

Obviously the mayor lied about the budget because revenue estimates changed in April.
Without doubt, the new trade deal will destroy local farms, although the tariff data is preliminary.
